headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://esm.sh; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://images.unsplash.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://esm.sh; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto:;
